info.title: Masumi SaaS API
info.description: HTTP API for Masumi SaaS (same origin as the web app). Authenticate with a session cookie or the x-api-key header (see API Keys in the app).

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Masumi SaaS API key from **API Keys** in the app. Also accepted: `Authorization: Bearer <key>` and header `token: <key>` (same name as the payment node uses) when the key starts with `mas_`.

get.description: Confirms this app and the Masumi payment service behind it are up. **503** means the payment service is unreachable or not reporting healthy.

200.description: App and payment service are healthy

429.description: Too many health checks from this client in the window

503.description: Payment service unreachable or unhealthy from this environment

example.error: Payment node health check timed out

get.description: Returns whether the caller is authenticated with a **browser session** or a **Masumi SaaS API key** (`x-api-key` / `Authorization: Bearer`). For API key auth, includes public metadata for that key (id, name, prefix, start fragment). Does **not** echo the secret key.

200.description: `authMethod` is `session` for cookie auth, or `apiKey` when the request was authenticated with an API key.

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

get.description: Paginated list of the authenticated user’s agents. Effective **network** filter uses the `network` query param, or the `payment_network` cookie when the query is omitted.

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

post.description: Creates a new agent and begins registration in Masumi SaaS. Returns **400** if `tags` is missing or empty after splitting on commas (at least one tag required).

schema.description: At least one tag is required: send `tags` as a comma-separated string (e.g. `"research, nlp"`).

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

schema.description: Agent ID (CUID)

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

schema.description: Agent ID (CUID)

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

schema.description: Agent ID (CUID)
Veridian **aid** (required). Optional **schemaSaid** to select a credential schema; defaults to the agent verification schema when omitted.

400.description: Invalid body (e.g. missing `aid`), KYC/agent preconditions, or credential validation failure. May include `details` (string[] or credential metadata object).

details.description: Optional: array of validation messages, or credential metadata (e.g. issuedAt, schemaSaid).

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

get.description: Returns the current verification challenge for the agent.

schema.description: Agent ID (CUID)

data.description: Also includes `secret` (string) for one-time HMAC configuration. It is intentionally omitted from this public schema—do not log, share, or paste into docs.

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

post.description: Optional body `{ "regenerate": true }` to issue a new challenge and invalidate the previous.

schema.description: Agent ID (CUID)

regenerate.description: If true, issue a new challenge and invalidate the previous

schema.description: Empty object `{}` is valid; pass `regenerate: true` to rotate the challenge.

data.description: Also includes `secret` (string) for one-time HMAC configuration. It is intentionally omitted from this public schema—do not log, share, or paste into docs.

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

202.description: Registration still pending (e.g. wallet funding); poll again shortly.

example.message: Wallet not yet funded. Poll again in a few seconds.

get.description: User, organizations, agents, API keys, balance snapshot, KYC hints — scoped to the authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized — valid session or API key required

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or feature not enabled

get.description: Cross-agent activity with filters (tab/type). Use `summary=1` for counts-only payload.

schema.description: Tab: all | lifecycle | transactions | purchases | payments | refundRequests | disputes. Unknown or missing → "all".

parameters.description: Tab: all | lifecycle | transactions | purchases | payments | refundRequests | disputes. Unknown or missing → "all".
parameters.name: filter

schema.description: Prefer Mainnet or Preprod; invalid or missing values default to Preprod (same as `parseNetwork`).

parameters.description: Prefer Mainnet or Preprod; invalid or missing values default to Preprod (same as `parseNetwork`).
parameters.name: network

schema.description: Set to "1" for summary counts (`totalTransactions`, `totalActivity`) instead of `items`.

parameters.description: Set to "1" for summary counts (`totalTransactions`, `totalActivity`) instead of `items`.
parameters.name: summary

schema.description: ISO timestamp for incremental sync; invalid or empty values are ignored.

parameters.description: ISO timestamp for incremental sync; invalid or empty values are ignored.
parameters.name: lastUpdate

schema.description: Page size when paginating with `cursor`. If omitted or empty, returns the first chunk (server max). When set: integer clamped between 1 and 50; non-numeric values default to 20.

parameters.description: Page size when paginating with `cursor`. If omitted or empty, returns the first chunk (server max). When set: integer clamped between 1 and 50; non-numeric values default to 20.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Opaque cursor from the previous response (`nextCursor`). A stale cursor yields HTTP 410.

parameters.description: Opaque cursor from the previous response (`nextCursor`). A stale cursor yields HTTP 410.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: With `summary=true`, `data` has `totalTransactions` and `totalActivity`; otherwise `data.items` is the feed.
